new_classes.label_en: Other Spirituous Beverage in Containers of More Than 2 Litres (CN 22089078)
new_classes.label_de: Andere alkoholhaltige Getränke in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (KN 22089078)
new_classes.definition_en: Other spirituous beverages as described under subheading 22089069, presented in containers of more than 2 litres, classified under CN code 22089078 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The legal text for 22089078 is minimal: it identifies the commodity as "other spirituous beverages" and cross-references the explanatory note for subheading 22089069. The primary distinguishing criterion between 22089078 and its sibling 22089069 is the container volume (> 2 litres for 22089078 vs. ≤ 2 litres for 22089069). This container-size criterion is captured via the decimalRange restriction on maxContainerVolumeL. The hasValue restriction on codeString anchors the class to its CN code. Coverage is incomplete (0.75) because the referenced explanatory note for 22089069 — which likely contains additional product-discriminating criteria defining what counts as an "other spirituous beverage" — is not reproduced in the legal notes provided, so those qualitative criteria cannot be axiomatised here.
